cases.input: We have an Azure subscription with VMs, AKS clusters, Azure SQL databases, App Service, and several storage accounts. Which Defender for Cloud plans should we enable for production?
cases.context: Production subscription, PCI-DSS compliance required, no existing Defender plans enabled, budget for security approved

cases.input: We have 3 Azure tenants: one main enterprise tenant and two acquired company tenants. We need a unified SOC view but data must stay in each tenant's region (EU data residency). Design our Sentinel workspace topology.
cases.context: MSSP model, EU and US regions, separate billing per tenant required, Azure Lighthouse available

cases.input: Design the analytics rule strategy for our Sentinel deployment. We need to detect impossible travel, privileged account abuse, and anomalous storage access. Include MITRE ATT&CK mapping.
cases.context: Sentinel workspace deployed, Entra ID Sign-In logs connected, Azure Activity connected, Defender for Cloud connected

cases.input: We get 50 alerts per day for failed privileged sign-ins. We want to automatically: create a ticket in ServiceNow, notify the user's manager via Teams, and block the account if 5+ failures in 1 hour. Design the SOAR automation.
cases.context: Microsoft Sentinel, Logic Apps for playbooks, ServiceNow ITSM connected, Teams notifications available, PIM for privileged accounts

cases.input: We want to integrate threat intelligence from our ISAC feed (STIX/TAXII 2.1) and Microsoft Defender Threat Intelligence into Sentinel. How should we configure TI ingestion and use it in analytics rules?
cases.context: Sentinel workspace, TAXII 2.1 server URL available from ISAC, MDTI standard tier licensed
